_comment: Random-event catalogue (§9, reworked). Selection model: a 20-turn grace period (event_grace_turns, NOT pace-scaled) suppresses all events at game start; thereafter ONE roll per player per turn at event_era_chance[player_era] decides whether ANY event fires; if it does, one eligible event is drawn weighted by `weight`. At game setup each event rolls its `active` percent (0-100) once to decide whether it is in this game at all (GameState.active_event_ids). An event is eligible for a player when it is in the roster, every `prereq` predicate holds, no `obsolete` tech is held, it is not a still-running timed instance, and (if `one_shot`) it has not already fired. PREREQ predicates (all ANDed): min_era/max_era (era index 0..6), at_war/at_peace, tech_all/tech_any (arrays), building (owned structure), civic (active policy id), state_religion (bool), resource_absent (own no tile with it), min_pop/max_pop (some owned city), coastal (some owned coastal city), players_tech {tech,count} (>=count players hold it), tile {terrain,feature,improvement,resource,route(bool),in_city_radius(bool)} (an owned tile matches all keys given). EFFECTS: an event either auto-applies begin `effects`, or presents non-skippable `choices` (each {id,text,effects}). Effect verbs (Events._apply_effect): gold (amount; negative=pay), research, research_pct_remaining {percent} (banks percent% of the current tech's remaining cost), research_pct_loss {percent} (loses percent% of the current tech's cost), culture (capital), tech ({tech_id} or cheapest), unit {unit_type,count}, building {structure_id}, capital_health, capital_pop, nearby_pop {amount,radius}, heal_units, golden_age, attitude {target:'rival'|'all_met',amount} (diplo_memory points), grant_promotion {promotion, classification?/domain?/unit_types?}, place_resource {resource, match, remove_feature?, add_improvement?, add_route?}, tile_yield {food?,production?,commerce?, match}, remove_feature {match}, remove_route {match}, remove_improvement {match}, city_happy_timed {amount,turns,scope:'capital'|'all'|'all_state_religion'}, food_store {amount? or pct?}, spawn_wild {unit_type,count,near:'capital'}. Roller-only templates expanded at FIRE time drawing gs.rng (so applying a resolved choice is RNG-free and deterministic regardless of when a human answers): an effect with `range`:[min,max] instead of `amount` rolls a value; `{verb:'chance',percent,then:[...]}` rolls once and, on success, splices in `then`. Tile-targeted verbs resolve their `match` predicate deterministically at apply time (first matching owned tile). All magnitudes are standard/normal; map-size and game-speed scaling is deferred (see docs/planning/event-subsystem-planning.md).

forest_fire.name: Forest Fire
forest_fire.text: Fire races through a forest near one of your cities.

choices.text: Pay the fire brigades (lose 10 gold)
Contain it cheaply (lose 4 gold and a forest)
Let it burn out (lose a forest; the people seethe)

motherload.name: Motherload
motherload.text: Miners strike an unexpectedly rich seam in your gold mine.

washed_out.name: Washed Out
washed_out.text: Heavy rains have washed out one of your roads.

choices.text: Leave it impassable (lose a road)
Rebuild at once (pay 20 gold)

breakthrough.name: Breakthrough
breakthrough.text: Your scholars report a sudden insight.

setback.name: Setback
setback.text: A line of inquiry proves to be a dead end.

faux_pas.name: Faux Pas
faux_pas.text: An envoy commits an embarrassing breach of etiquette abroad.

bowyer.name: Bowyer
bowyer.text: A master bowyer trains your archers in disciplined volley fire.

spicy.name: Spicy
spicy.text: Foragers find aromatic spices growing wild in a nearby forest.

choices.text: Gather them as they grow (the forest gains Spices)
Clear and cultivate (pay 20 gold; plantation + road)

truffles.name: Truffles
truffles.text: Truffles are discovered under the grass of one of your tiles.

marathon.name: Marathon
marathon.text: Your soldiers' heroic endurance in the field inspires the whole nation.

earth_day.name: Earth Day
earth_day.text: A grassroots conservation movement sweeps your cities.

choices.text: Let the people celebrate (+1 happy in every city, 10 turns)
Fund a national programme (pay 60 gold; +1 happy, 10 turns)

gold_rush.name: Gold Rush
gold_rush.text: Word of a strike at your mine draws a flood of fortune-seekers.

choices.text: Let them settle (the city grows by 1)
Throw up a boomtown (pay 20 gold; the city grows by 3)

security_tax.name: Security Tax
security_tax.text: Your walled cities levy a toll on the caravans sheltering within.

the_huns.name: The Huns
the_huns.text: A horde of mounted raiders sweeps in from the steppe.

dust_bowl.name: Dust Bowl
dust_bowl.text: A choking dust storm scours the topsoil from your plains farms.

choices.text: Subsidise the farmers (pay 40 gold; lose 1 farm)
Ride it out (lose 1 farm — and maybe another)

parrots.name: Parrots
parrots.text: Bright parrots flock to the jungle near one of your cities — their feathers fetch a fine price.

jade.name: Jade
jade.text: Miners working an iron mine uncover a seam of fine green jade.

black_pearls.name: Black Pearls
black_pearls.text: Your fishers haul up rare black pearls along with the day's catch of clams.

saltpeter.name: Saltpeter
saltpeter.text: A deposit of saltpeter is found in a wooded hill, prized by the powder-makers.

clunker_coal.name: Clunker Coal
clunker_coal.text: A coal seam at one of your mines proves to be poor, sooty stuff.

sour_crude.name: Sour Crude
sour_crude.text: The crude from one of your wells turns out to be sour and hard to refine.

sea_turtles.name: Sea Turtles
sea_turtles.text: A nesting ground of sea turtles is found off your coast — a reliable source of food.

tin.name: Tin
tin.text: A vein of tin is struck in one of your hill mines, vital for casting bronze.

prairie_dogs.name: Prairie Dogs
prairie_dogs.text: Trappers find a thriving prairie-dog colony on the plains — their pelts sell well.

forty_thieves.name: Forty Thieves
forty_thieves.text: A band of brigands is broken up on one of your roads, their plundered hoard recovered.

ancient_texts.name: Ancient Texts
ancient_texts.text: An expedition into the desert recovers a cache of ancient scholarly texts.

choices.text: Have your scholars study them (advance 15% toward your research)
Share the find with your neighbours (improve relations with all you have met)

waters_of_life.name: Waters of Life
waters_of_life.text: A desert oasis in your lands becomes a celebrated stop for traders.

horseshoe.name: Horseshoe
horseshoe.text: A farrier perfects a new horseshoe, and your riders learn to wheel and flank with it.

axe_haft.name: Axe Haft
axe_haft.text: A smith devises a sturdier axe haft, and your axemen strike with new force.

tower_shield.name: Tower Shield
tower_shield.text: Your warriors adopt the tall tower shield, far better at warding off blows.

smokeless_powder.name: Smokeless Powder
smokeless_powder.text: Your gunsmiths refine a cleaner powder, and your musketmen fire with deadly precision.

stronger_fittings.name: Stronger Fittings
stronger_fittings.text: Stronger fittings make your crossbows more reliable, and the bolts fly truer.

firing_pins.name: Firing Pins
firing_pins.text: A new firing pin makes your grenadiers' weapons faster to load and surer to fire.

rifled_cannon.name: Rifled Cannon
rifled_cannon.text: Rifling the cannon bores doubles their accuracy and range.

metal_decks.name: Metal Decks
metal_decks.text: Armoured metal flight decks let your carriers launch and recover aircraft far more efficiently.

halberd.name: Halberd
halberd.text: Your pikemen take up the halberd, hooking and hewing through any charge.

reinforced_hull.name: Reinforced Hull
reinforced_hull.text: Reinforced hulls let your triremes ram harder and survive rougher seas.

the_vandals.name: The Vandals
the_vandals.text: A war-band of Vandals descends on your frontier, blades drawn.

the_goths.name: The Goths
the_goths.text: A host of Goths comes raiding out of the wilderness.

the_philistines.name: The Philistines
the_philistines.text: A column of Philistine spearmen marches against your lands.

the_vedic_aryans.name: The Vedic Aryans
the_vedic_aryans.text: Vedic Aryan archers sweep down upon your borders.

holy_ritual.name: Holy Ritual
holy_ritual.text: Pilgrims gather at your temple for an incense-burning rite, and leave offerings behind.

farm_plows.name: Farm Plows
farm_plows.text: Your smiths forge sturdy iron plows, and the farmers pay handsomely for them.

stained_glass.name: Stained Glass
stained_glass.text: Pilgrims flock to admire the new stained glass in your cathedral, and their donations pour in.

marble_statues.name: Marble Statues
marble_statues.text: Your sculptors carve celebrated statues from quarried marble, sold to collectors abroad.

crab_cakes.name: Crab Cakes
crab_cakes.text: A craze for crab cakes sweeps your markets, enriching the fishers.

boilers.name: Boilers
boilers.text: Your factory begins turning out steel boilers, and the orders flood in.

personal_computers.name: Personal Computers
personal_computers.text: Your factories begin assembling personal computers, and demand is staggering.

fuel_additives.name: Fuel Additives
fuel_additives.text: A new cleaner-burning fuel additive becomes the standard, and your public transit pays it forward.

hamburger_joint.name: Hamburger Joint
hamburger_joint.text: A wildly popular hamburger chain opens in your lands, built on your cattle pastures.

tea.name: Tea
tea.text: A brisk tea trade springs up through your harbours.

fashion.name: Fashion
fashion.text: A silk fashion house in your lands becomes the toast of the world.

thoroughbred.name: Thoroughbred
thoroughbred.text: Your stables breed a celebrated line of thoroughbred horses, fetching a fortune.

girls_best_friend.name: A Girl's Best Friend
girls_best_friend.text: Gems from one of your mines are cut into dazzling jewels by your forge-masters.

banana_split.name: Banana Split
banana_split.text: A refrigerated banana trade flourishes through your plantations.

inspired_mission.name: Inspired Mission
inspired_mission.text: A charismatic missionary rallies the faithful of your state religion.

hymns_and_sculptures.name: Hymns and Sculptures
hymns_and_sculptures.text: Your cathedral inspires a generation of devotional artists.

bards_tale.name: A Bard's Tale
bards_tale.text: A wandering bard composes an epic in your honour.

choices.text: Enjoy the performance (+100 culture)
Become the bard's patron (pay 50 gold, +450 culture)

ice_sculpture.name: Ice Sculpture
ice_sculpture.text: An artisan carves a wonder from the tundra ice.

choices.text: Display it proudly (+100 culture)
Take the artist into your court (pay 30 gold, settle a Great Artist)

patron_of_knowledge.name: Patron of Knowledge
patron_of_knowledge.text: A wealthy patron endows your library with rare manuscripts.

choices.text: Pore over the new texts (+10% toward your current research)
Endow the library (pay 20 gold; +1 research from the library forever)

master_smith.name: Master Smith
master_smith.text: A master smith takes up residence at your forge.

rural_farmers.name: Rural Farmers
rural_farmers.text: Rural farmers flock to sell their produce at your grocer.

money_changers.name: Money Changers
money_changers.text: Money changers set up shop in your market.

literacy.name: Literacy
literacy.text: A surge of literacy produces a brilliant scholar.

miracle.name: Miracle
miracle.text: Pilgrims claim a miracle has occurred at your city walls.

choices.text: Enshrine the spot (+1 commerce from the walls forever)
Proclaim a pilgrimage (pay 20 gold; spread your religion to 2 cities)

esteemed_playwright.name: An Esteemed Playwright
esteemed_playwright.text: An esteemed playwright premieres at your theatre.

choices.text: Offer a residency (+1 commerce from the theatre forever)
Commission a new play (+3 culture)

favorite_son.name: Favorite Son
favorite_son.text: A local champion triumphs at the colosseum games.

choices.text: Award a victory purse (+20 gold)
Erect a statue (+2 culture from the colosseum forever)

secret_knowledge.name: Secret Knowledge
secret_knowledge.text: Your monks uncover forgotten secret knowledge.

choices.text: Decode the texts (+15% toward your current research)
Preserve them in the monastery (pay 10 gold; +4 culture from the monastery forever)

high_warlord.name: High Warlord
high_warlord.text: A feared warlord offers to serve your crown from his castle stronghold.

choices.text: Accept his tribute (+100 gold)
Levy his retinue (two pikemen)
Ennoble the warlord (settle a Great General)

spoiled_grain.name: Spoiled Grain
spoiled_grain.text: Rot spreads through the granary stores.

choices.text: Discard the spoiled grain (lose half your stored food)
Pay for fresh stores (pay 20 gold)

angel_of_mercy.name: Angel of Mercy
angel_of_mercy.text: A devoted nurse becomes the soul of your hospital.

choices.text: Fund her clinic (+2 gold from the hospital forever)
Honour her publicly (pay 10 gold; +1 happy from the hospital forever)

chilly_flight.name: Chilly Flight
chilly_flight.text: A heroic pilot lands safely at your airport in foul weather.

new_dynasty.name: A New Dynasty
new_dynasty.text: A new royal dynasty rises in your capital, drawing talent to court.

choices.text: Crown a warrior-king (settle a Great General)
Crown a merchant-prince (settle a Great Merchant)
Crown a priest-king (settle a Great Prophet)

too_close_to_call.name: Too Close To Call
too_close_to_call.text: A contested election is settled in your courthouses.

choices.text: Order a careful recount (+1 gold from the courthouse forever)
Celebrate the result (+3 culture from the courthouse forever)

great_beast.name: The Great Beast
great_beast.text: Hunters corner a legendary beast near your camp.

choices.text: Hold a hunting feast (+1 food on a tile)
Proclaim a festival (+1 happy for 40 turns in your faithful cities)

controversial_philosopher.name: Controversial Philosopher
controversial_philosopher.text: A controversial philosopher stirs debate in your capital.

choices.text: Tolerate the debate (+1 happy for 15 turns in the capital)
Make him a court scholar (a free Scientist specialist)
Found an Academy for him (pay 30 gold; build an Academy)

civ_game.name: The Civilization Game
civ_game.text: A wildly popular strategy game sweeps your computerised society.

choices.text: Embrace the craze (+1 happy for 10 turns in every city)
Study its design (+3 research from your universities forever)
License the game (gain gold)

rabbi.name: The Rabbi
rabbi.text: A revered rabbi draws converts and scholars to your monastery.

choices.text: Send him to preach (spread your religion to 3 cities)
Keep him as a scholar (a free Scientist specialist)
Endow his monastery (+2 culture from the monastery forever and 50 gold)

golden_buddha.name: The Golden Buddha
golden_buddha.text: Your smiths cast a golden idol from the gold of your mines.

choices.text: Sell the gold leaf (gain gold)
Enshrine it at the forge (+6 culture from the forge forever)

preaching_researcher.name: The Preaching Researcher
preaching_researcher.text: A scholar-monk lectures across your university and monastery.

choices.text: Publish his sermons (+2 culture)
Endow his chair (pay 20 gold; +2 culture and +2 research from the monastery forever)

freedom_concert.name: Freedom Concert
freedom_concert.text: A jubilant concert celebrates freedom of worship in your city.

choices.text: Join the celebration (+1 pop and +1 happy for 10 turns in the capital)
Spread the good word (your religion spreads to 3 cities)

airliner_crash.name: Airliner Crash
airliner_crash.text: An airliner goes down near your border. The wreckage holds secrets — and grief.

choices.text: Offer condolences (+1 attitude with a neighbour)
Quietly recover the black box (+1000 espionage points)
Reverse-engineer the wreck (+15% research; a neighbour resents it)

fugitive.name: Fugitive
fugitive.text: A fugitive from a neighbouring realm seeks asylum in your lands.

choices.text: Return him in chains (+1 attitude with a neighbour)
Grant him sanctuary (a neighbour is angered; you gain intelligence)

wedding_feud.name: Wedding Feud
wedding_feud.text: A royal wedding to a neighbour of a different faith curdles into a feud.

choices.text: Snub them (a neighbour is offended)
Buy goodwill (pay 20 gold; +1 happy 10 turns, but they still bristle)
Take grave offence (pay 10 gold; declare war on the offender)

looters.name: Looters
looters.text: Discontent in a neighbour's city spills over into a looting spree near your border.

choices.text: Let your people join in (pillage 1 of the neighbour's improvements)
Organize the raid (pay 10 gold; pillage 3 of the neighbour's improvements)
Bankroll saboteurs (spend espionage; pillage and burn a building)
Restrain your people (a neighbour resents the chaos)

hurricane.name: Hurricane
hurricane.text: A hurricane batters one of your coastal cities.

choices.text: Survey the ruins (a cheap and an expensive building are destroyed)
Evacuate the waterfront (lose 1 population instead)

cyclone.name: Cyclone
cyclone.text: A cyclone tears across one of your coastal cities.

choices.text: Weather the storm (two cheap buildings are destroyed)
Shelter the people (lose 1 population instead)

tsunami.name: Tsunami
tsunami.text: A towering tsunami crashes over one of your coastal cities.

choices.text: Endure the deluge (buildings are swept away and population is lost)

monsoon.name: Monsoon
monsoon.text: A relentless monsoon floods one of your inland cities.

choices.text: Drain the streets (a cheap building is lost)
Relocate the lowlands (lose 1 population instead)

blizzard.name: Blizzard
blizzard.text: A blizzard buries the roads and works around one of your cities.

choices.text: Let the snows win (an improvement and its road are buried)
Pay the work gangs (pay 5 gold)

volcano.name: Volcano
volcano.text: A peak near one of your cities erupts, burying the works on its slopes.

mining_accident.name: Mining Accident
mining_accident.text: A cave-in strikes one of your mines.

choices.text: Fund the rescue (pay 20 gold)
Cut your losses (pay 5 gold; lose the mine)
Abandon the shaft (lose the mine; the people seethe)

cigarette_smoker.name: Cigarette Smoker
cigarette_smoker.text: A careless smoker sets fire to your theatre.

choices.text: Compensate the troupe (pay 30 gold)
Salvage what you can (pay 10 gold; lose the theatre)
Let it burn (lose the theatre; the city is angry)

heroic_gesture.name: Heroic Gesture
heroic_gesture.text: With the war turning your way, an envoy proposes an honourable peace.

choices.text: Press your advantage (carry on the war)
Make a magnanimous peace (+1 attitude with the foe)

great_mediator.name: Great Mediator
great_mediator.text: After a long war, a respected mediator offers to broker peace.

choices.text: Refuse the mediation (the war goes on)
Accept the mediation (+2 attitude; end the war)

industrial_fire.name: Industrial Fire
industrial_fire.text: A fire breaks out in one of your factories.

choices.text: Let it burn out (lose the factory)
Pour in the fire crews (pay 100 gold; save the factory)

heresy.name: Heresy
heresy.text: A heretical movement challenges the state faith.

choices.text: Suppress it harshly (anger now; the faith spreads to 2 cities)
Win the debate (pay 10 gold; +15% religious research)
Ignore the zealots (nothing happens)

defecting_agent.name: Defecting Agent
defecting_agent.text: One of your intelligence agents goes missing — perhaps defected.

choices.text: Write off the loss (-300 espionage points)
Hunt the defector (pay 20 gold; you may recover the loss)
Blame a rival publicly (a neighbour resents the accusation)

jail.name: Jail
jail.text: Conditions in your city jail spark a public outcry.

choices.text: Ignore the outcry (-1 happy for 10 turns)
Reform the jail (pay 100 gold)

broken_dam.name: Broken Dam
broken_dam.text: The dam above one of your cities gives way.

choices.text: The waters break through (lose the hydro plant, anger, and population)
Shore up the dam (pay 100 gold; save the plant)

happy_hunting.name: Happy Hunting
happy_hunting.text: A great herd is driven into your tundra forests, and the larders fill.

at_the_sword.name: At the Sword
at_the_sword.text: A wounded swordsman recovers and returns to your ranks battle-hardened.

man_named_jed.name: A Man Named Jed
man_named_jed.text: One of your scouts stumbles on bubbling black crude beneath his feet.

choices.text: Pay it no mind (nothing comes of it)
Stake the claim (pay 10 gold; reveal Oil)

farm_bandits.name: Farm Bandits
farm_bandits.text: Bandits raid the grain wagons leaving one of your farms.

choices.text: Pay them off (lose 10 gold)
Send the militia (lose 5 food; your escort cannot attack a while)

horticulture.name: Horticulture
horticulture.text: Your gardeners cultivate a prized strain among the trees.

choices.text: Sell the harvest (+1 commerce on the tile)
Endow a physic garden (pay 10 gold; +1 health for 20 turns)

joyous_wedding.name: Joyous Wedding
joyous_wedding.text: A royal wedding to a like-minded neighbour delights both realms.

choices.text: Celebrate together (relations with a neighbour improve)
Host a grand feast (pay 20 gold; relations warm further)

left_at_the_altar.name: Left at the Altar
left_at_the_altar.text: A betrothal to a neighbour's house collapses in scandal.

baby_boom.name: Baby Boom
baby_boom.text: Peace brings a joyful surge of newborns across your realm.

brothers_in_need.name: Brothers in Need
brothers_in_need.text: A co-religionist realm at war begs you for a spare strategic resource.

appleseed.name: Appleseed
appleseed.text: A wandering planter sows an orchard-forest on your plains.

running_bulls.name: Running of the Bulls
running_bulls.text: A festival of running bulls thunders through your pastures.

choices.text: Hold the festival (+100 culture)
Make it a grand spectacle (pay nothing; +300 culture)

great_depression.name: The Great Depression
great_depression.text: Markets collapse worldwide and every treasury bleeds.

bermuda_triangle.name: Bermuda Triangle
bermuda_triangle.text: One of your ships vanishes without trace in strange waters.

motor_oil.name: Motor Oil
motor_oil.text: Refiners at your wells perfect a fine motor oil.

choices.text: Sell the surplus (+50 gold)
Oil your war machine (pay 15 gold; free support for 4 units)

federal_reserve.name: Federal Reserve
federal_reserve.text: A central bank is founded to steady your currency.

choices.text: A modest tightening (-10% inflation)
Aggressive policy (pay 50 gold; -25% inflation)

electric_company.name: Electric Company
electric_company.text: Electrification brings light and cheer to all your cities.

hindenburg.name: The Hindenburg
hindenburg.text: A great airship disaster shocks the world — or passes you by.

choices.text: Yours is spared (nothing happens)
Raise a memorial (pay 10 gold; +1 happy 10 turns)

comet_fragment.name: Comet Fragment
comet_fragment.text: A comet fragment falls in your tundra forests — rich in rare metals.

influenza.name: Influenza
influenza.text: A virulent flu sweeps your crowded cities.

choices.text: Pay for quarantine (pay 20 gold; -1 health for 10 turns)
Let it run its course (the sickness lingers and spreads)

solo_flight.name: Solo Flight
solo_flight.text: A daring aviator completes a record flight, the toast of every nation.

antelope.name: Antelope
antelope.text: A herd of swift deer settles in your tundra woods.

choices.text: Leave them be (the deer settle in)
Build a hunting camp (pay 10 gold; deer + camp + road)

whale_of_a_thing.name: A Whale of a Thing
whale_of_a_thing.text: A pod of whales is sighted off your coast.

hi_yo_silver.name: Hi Yo Silver
hi_yo_silver.text: Prospectors strike a seam of silver in your hills.

choices.text: Stake the claim (the hill gains Silver)
Sink a mine (pay 10 gold; silver + mine + road)

wining_monks.name: Wining Monks
wining_monks.text: Your monks perfect a celebrated vintage among the vines.

choices.text: Tend the wild vines (the tile gains Wine)
Found a winery (pay 10 gold; wine + winery + road)

independent_films.name: Independent Films
independent_films.text: A scrappy independent film scene blossoms in your cities.

ancient_olympics.name: Ancient Olympics
ancient_olympics.text: You host a great athletic games in honour of the old gods.

choices.text: A modest games (nothing of note)
A grand spectacle (pay 20 gold; relations with all neighbours warm)

modern_olympics.name: Modern Olympics
modern_olympics.text: You revive the Olympic Games to worldwide acclaim.

interstate.name: Interstate
interstate.text: A national highway network knits your realm together.

impact_crater.name: Impact Crater
impact_crater.text: A meteor gouges a crater in your jungle, exposing radioactive ore.

choices.text: Cordon it off (nothing comes of it)
Mine the crater (pay 10 gold; reveal Uranium + mine)

laboratory.name: Laboratory
laboratory.text: A breakthrough in one of your laboratories accelerates research.

experienced_captain.name: Experienced Captain
experienced_captain.text: A veteran sea captain offers his services at your drydock.

choices.text: Commission him (+2 gold from the drydock forever)
Found a Military Academy for him (pay 30 gold; build one)

crisis_in_senate.name: Crisis in the Senate
crisis_in_senate.text: A scandal grips your senate, and the factions vie for advantage.

choices.text: Plant your agents (+2 espionage from your barracks)
Take the bribes (gain gold)
Reconcile the factions (+1 happy in every city)

charismatic.name: Charismatic Leader
charismatic.text: A charismatic figure rallies your war machine and your people.

choices.text: Drill the army (your gunpowder units gain March)
Rally the people (+1 happy for 10 turns in every city)

friendly_locals.name: Friendly Locals
friendly_locals.text: Friendly locals nurse one of your wounded units back to fighting form.

immigrants.name: Immigrants
immigrants.text: Your prosperous, contented city draws a wave of newcomers.

healing_plant.name: Healing Plant
healing_plant.text: Your herbalists discover a potent healing plant.

choices.text: Brew a tonic for the people (+1 happy for 10 turns)
Open a healing clinic (+1 health for 20 turns)

better_coal.name: Better Coal
better_coal.text: A cleaner-burning grade of coal arrives at your works.

choices.text: Fire the power plants (+4 production from your coal plants)
Supply the shipyards (+2 production and cleaner air at your drydocks)

toxcatl.name: Toxcatl
toxcatl.text: The festival of Toxcatl demands a sacrifice at your altar.

choices.text: Refuse the rite (the priests seethe; +2 angry)
Offer a captive (a unit is bound to the altar, immobile 3 turns)

dissident_priest.name: Dissident Priest
dissident_priest.text: A dissident priest stirs unrest in one of your provincial cities.

choices.text: Exile him (a brief revolt and anger in the city)
Appease the faithful (pay 20 gold; +1 research from your libraries)

pasture_built.name: Pasture Built
pasture_built.text: Herders settle a fine grazing tract and raise a pasture.

rogue_station.name: Rogue Station
rogue_station.text: A rogue broadcast tower spreads dissident propaganda.

choices.text: Shut it down (-100 espionage; lose the tower)
Let it run (the city seethes for 10 turns)

anti_monarchists.name: Anti-Monarchists
anti_monarchists.text: Republican agitators challenge the crown in the streets.

choices.text: Win the court's loyalty (+3 happy from your palace forever)
Court the clergy (+2 gold from your cathedrals forever)

impeachment.name: Impeachment
impeachment.text: A bitter impeachment crisis convulses your republic.

choices.text: Convict and move on (anger now, relief soon)
Acquit amid uproar (+2 production from a courthouse; brief revolt)
